Definition: Stephan collection 4-digit specimen/species code printed before the name
Note: links to the Stephan brain collection numbering used across Stephan/Baron/Frahm papers

Definition: species name as printed in Stephan Baron & Frahm 1988 Table 1 (classification of the day)
Note: single "species" column in the snapshot also carries the grade labels (Tenrecinae/Scandentia/Prosimians/Simians) as rows; taxonomy applied later via ../_keys/Stephan/species_key.csv
snapshot 'BoW (g)'; printed with thousands commas; pools with Stephan_etal_1981 body weight

Definition: encephalization index (observed brain weight relative to the Tenrecinae reference line)
Note: snapshot 'EI'; based on the Tenrecinae reference line (slope 0.63; y-intercept 1.6128); see method note

Definition: activity pattern (ecoethological code 1): D diurnal / N nocturnal
Reference: snapshot ecoethological column (1); given for primates only

Definition: diet category (ecoethological code 2): 1 insectivores; 2 frugivores; 3 folivores; 3a generalist folivores; 3b nocturnal strict folivores; 3c diurnal strict folivores

Reference: snapshot ecoethological column (3); primates only; OCR '0MB' corrected to printed 'OMB'

Definition: reference numbers (ecoethological code 4) keyed to the footnote source list (1 Erikson 1963 ... 21 Walker 1979)
encephalization index = observed BrW / expected BrW from the Tenrecinae reference line (log-log; slope 0.63; y-intercept 1.6128); points on the line have EI = 1.
